title: Eva 01 themed shinkansen train
wikitext:
[]: Eva 01 themed shinkansen train             Quote Post by vito » Thu Jul 23, 2015 3:54 pm http://www.500type-eva.jp/ design looks pretty cool [URL=http://someimage.com/PiAFQ69] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Thu Jul 23, 2015 4:09 pm http://en.rocketnews24.com/2015/07/24/the-evangelion-shinkansen-will-let-you-ride-the-rails-like-a-cool-angel-this-fall/ JR West’s press release also says that an array of Shinkansen Evangelion Project merchandise will be available, and that passengers can look forward to the Evangelion theme extending to the interior of the train as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Thu Jul 23, 2015 4:13 pm That's it! We've reached peak Eva Merchandising levels! Alert! Alert!

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Thu Jul 23, 2015 5:11 pm Think it'll have orange tinted windows for that proper "hell train" experience?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Aug 21, 2015 8:04 pm Pretty cool stuff: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Oct 19, 2015 6:26 pm Evangelion Bullet Train shown off in real life.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Nov 06, 2015 8:06 pm Yamashita has been attending some fancy opening ceremonies today and tweeting his way through, also going for a ride: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Nov 07, 2015 2:03 pm Clever bit of promoting for the bullet train: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sat Nov 07, 2015 3:12 pm (There's already a thread about those pictures here .)

[]: Re: Eva 01 themed shinkansen train             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri May 11, 2018 3:21 pm This tweet pertains to the end of the Eva Bullet Train. Here's a transcription and a translation. I don't guarantee it's 100%, but it should be mostly correct. I took the liberty of making the train a lady on account of the letter being addressed to the train as if it were a person. (As far as I can tell, anyway. Maybe "[name of train]-sama" is just a formality that refers to people associated with the train and its upkeep. If this is the case, please let me know.) エヴァ新幹線様江。 長きに渡る運行業務、どうも御苦労様でした。 運行終了は一抹の寂しさを感じますが、2016年5月に妻の両親、 母親と叔母と妻と6人で乗った時にはお世話になりました。 あの先頭車両が新山口駅入線した時のインパクトは妻共々、今でも忘れられません。 新神戸までの乗車は、皆がすごく喜び、楽しんでいて家族の良き想い出となっています。 本当にありがとうございましたた。 庵野秀明 Dear Madam Eva Bullet Train, My dearest gratitude for staying up and running for such a long time. I feel a tinge of sadness that your service has come to an end, m'lady. But I am indebted to you for the time I rode you with my wife, her parents, my mother, and my aunt back in May 2016. My wife and I have yet to forget the impact that your lead car made when it arrived at Shin-Yamaguchi Station. We have lovely family memories of taking you all the way to Shinkobe and everyone having a wonderful time. Thank you really and truly, Hideaki Anno

[]: Re: Eva 01 themed shinkansen train             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Fri May 11, 2018 5:48 pm ^ That is absolutely adorable. Is Anno turning into an otaku?

[]: Re: Eva 01 themed shinkansen train             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri May 11, 2018 6:00 pm DarkBluePhoenix wrote: ^ That is absolutely adorable. Is Anno turning into an otaku?

[]: Re: Eva 01 themed shinkansen train             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri May 11, 2018 6:17 pm Anno is a fucking nerd. He's one of us. That message is more poetic than I expected.

[]: Re: Eva 01 themed shinkansen train             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Fri May 11, 2018 6:59 pm Reichu wrote: Turning into? He's always been one. (Check out the manga and/or anime version of Insufficient Direction if you can -- Moyoco lays her husband's nerdy proclivities bare in the cutest way imaginable.)

[]: Re: Eva 01 themed shinkansen train             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri May 11, 2018 8:27 pm DarkBluePhoenix wrote: Well given his hatred of otaku in the past, I just assumed he hadn't taken that dive. Color me mildly surprised.

[]: Re: Eva 01 themed shinkansen train             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat May 12, 2018 12:34 am He has said that those who criticize otaku without being otaku themselves are acting in a dumb manner. He does it because he is one, so he's talking to his peers. It's something like self-improvement. But as shown here he can be very lighhearted about it, like with the train thing.

[]: Re: Eva 01 themed shinkansen train             Quote Post by Joseki » Sat May 12, 2018 4:57 am Reichu wrote: (don't quote entire posts when it's not needed, please -Reichu)

[]: Re: Eva 01 themed shinkansen train             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 12, 2018 5:40 am Alas, the train being a lady is a translation liberty, as I mention at the start. (Normally I would attempt to be more upstanding and avoid this kind of liberty, but as soon as I saw it was a letter to an Eva-01 train I decided I was going to have fun. Between the Eva-01 motif and the convention in English for machines you ride to be 'female', it felt justifiable enough in translation...)

[]: Re: Eva 01 themed shinkansen train             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Sat May 12, 2018 12:13 pm kuribo-04 wrote: He has said that those who criticize otaku without being otaku themselves are acting in a dumb manner. He does it because he is one, so he's talking to his peers. It's something like self-improvement. But as shown here he can be very lighhearted about it, like with the train thing.

[]: Re: Eva 01 themed shinkansen train             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sat May 12, 2018 4:08 pm I just recently learned that 3 of the Shinkansen train lines are named Hikari, Nozomi, and Kodama. So, basically all the Horakis are named after speedy trains.
